scripts.runner:local: pnpm --dir ../.. exec tsx --eval "import { startHostedRunnerServer } from './src/runner-server.ts'; const port = Number.parseInt(process.env.PORT ?? '8080', 10) || 8080; await startHostedRunnerServer({ controlToken: process.env.HOSTED_EXECUTION_RUNNER_CONTROL_TOKEN ?? null, port }); await new Promise(() => {});"
scripts.test: pnpm typecheck && pnpm --dir ../.. exec vitest run --config apps/cloudflare/vitest.config.ts --no-coverage --maxWorkers 1
